is considerably weakened by the presence of Ketu, and by the
aspect of Saturn, Mars, Sun, Mercury, Venus and Rahu. Venus,
the lord of Lagna, is completely combust. Death took place
when the Sun in his transit passed through the Sign Aries, which
is the Amsa of the lord of 8th viz. Saturn. The Moon too was
then in Sagittarius which is trine to Aries that is the ArhSa
Rasi of Saturn, lord of 8th.
Case VII. Male born at 6 A.M. on 8-3-1946, died at 6-20 P.M.
on 13-12-1950. lived for about five years.
Explanation :—Balance of Sukradasa was 8 yrs. 6 m. 9 d.
Though Jupiter is in the 9th, there was no help from that
